title: Basic Knife Skills
description: Learn how to properly hold a knife, basic cutting techniques, and safety tips.

steps.instruction: Hold the knife with a firm grip, using your dominant hand.
Use a cutting board to protect your surfaces and keep the knife steady.
Practice the claw grip with your non-dominant hand to keep fingers safe.
Learn to slice, dice, and chop various vegetables.

safety_tips: Always cut away from your body.
Keep your knife sharp for safer cutting.
Never leave a knife in a sink full of water.
